cards.name: Woody - Helping a Friend
cards.cardText:
HANG ON! When you play this character, choose one of the following. If you have another Toy character in play, choose both instead:
• You may return a character card with cost 2 or less from your discard to your hand.
• You may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.

cards.name: Ming Lee - Proud Parent
cards.cardText:
BIGGEST FAN If you have a character named Meilin Lee in play, you pay 1 {} less to play this character.

FOLLOW THE MUSIC If you played a song this turn, you pay 1 {} less to play this character.

cards.name: Isabela Madrigal - Kind Cultivator
cards.cardText:
She didn't just clear the vines from her friends' path—
she turned the tendrils into beautiful scenery.

cards.name: Tyler Nguyen-Baker - 4*Town Fan
cards.cardText: "I can't believe they're right there! This is the best day of my life"

cards.name: Rabbit - Hunny Paladin
cards.cardText:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted.
An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
HUNNY AURA When you play this character,
chosen Hunny character gets +1 {} this turn.

cards.name: Celia Mae - Friendly Receptionist
cards.cardText:
PLEASE HOLD When you play this character, you may pay 1 {} to ready chosen character of yours. They can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.

"You'll have to speak up. I can't hear you over my hair."

cards.name: Meilin Lee - Lead Vocalist
cards.cardText:
Singer 3 (This character counts as cost 3 to sing songs.)
BAND LOYALTY This character can't sing songs without Sing Together.

cards.name: Priya Mangal - Serious Music Lover
cards.cardText:
THIS IS MY JAM When you play this character, if there's a song card in your discard, gain 1 lore.

"I was born to do this."

cards.name: Miriam Mendelsohn - Ticket Holder
cards.cardText:
I GOT ’EM! When you play this character, each player draws a card.

"Most things are, like, whatever. But my friends are, like, yeah!"

cards.name: Lilo - Patient Weaver
cards.cardText:
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {} to another chosen character’s {} this turn.)

"Okay Scrump, now it's time for the finishing touches."

cards.name: Kocoum - Defender of the Tribe
cards.cardText:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

"It's dangerous out there."

cards.name: Pocahontas - Guiding the Tribe
cards.cardText:
STAY CLOSE When you play this character, you may play a character with cost 1 for free.

"These vines are far from natural. They must end somewhere."

cards.name: Woody - Town Sheriff
cards.cardText:
MOVE ALONG When you play this character, until the start of your next turn, chosen opposing character can’t challenge and must quest if able.

"This town ain't big enough for the two of us."

cards.name: Abby Park - Over the Top
cards.cardText:
ROCK THE MIC Once during your turn, whenever you play a song, you may ready this character. If you do, she can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.

Putting the "POW" in "power ballad"!

cards.name: Gaston - Superior Archer
cards.cardText:
WATCH THIS! When you play this character, you may banish chosen character with 5 {} or more.

"Is that the best you can do? Let me show you how a real marksman does it!"

cards.name: Meilin Lee - Losing Control
cards.cardText: RED PANDA POWER When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Red Panda character card or a song card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: 4*Town - Hottest Band of the Year
cards.cardText:
Singer 5 (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)

STAR PERFORMANCE Whenever this character sings a song with Sing Together, draw a card.

"I never met nobody . . . like you."

cards.name: Mike Wazowski - Heroic Climber
cards.cardText: FIND A FRIEND When you play this character and whenever he quests, each player reveals the top card of their deck. If it’s a character card, they may put it into their hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of their deck.

cards.name: Boo - In Disguise
cards.cardText:
YOU’RE SAFE NOW While you have an exerted character named Sulley in play, this character can’t be challenged.

"Sullivan's cousin's sister's daughter is a real go-getter.
Lots of potential."
–Henry J. Waternoose III

cards.name: Jasmine - Vine Expert
cards.cardText:
SHARED RESOURCES When you play this character, each player draws a card.

"This looks like a problem, and I've got a solution!"

cards.name: Mike Wazowski - Well-Rounded Entertainer
cards.cardText:
MAKE 'EM LAUGH When you play this character, you may pay 2 {} to give chosen character +1 {} this turn.

"Hey, good evening, how are ya? Nice to see ya. I tell you it's great to be here in . . . your room. Where are you from?"

cards.name: The Horned King - Merciless Master
cards.cardText: CAULDRON'S POWER While this character is exerted, you may play characters from your discard. If you do, they enter play exerted. (You pay all costs.)

cards.name: Kanga - Hunny Bard
cards.cardText:
Singer 5 (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)

No matter how scary things got, Kanga's uplifting tunes kept the party's spirits - and courage - high.

cards.name: Sulley - The New Boss
cards.cardText:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

REHIRE When you play this character, you may return a character card from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Mirabel Madrigal - Family Guardian
cards.cardText: MIRACULOUS PROTECTION Whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, you may ready them. If you do, they can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.

cards.name: Ursula - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
ENERGY SAP Whenever one of your Floodborn characters quests, chosen opposing character gets -1 {} until the start of your next turn.

The vine-created copy of Vanessa was as dangerous as it was beautiful.

cards.name: Pocahontas & Meeko - Adventurous Friends
cards.cardText:
Shift 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Pocahontas or Meeko.)
Evasive
WELCOME RETURN Whenever this character quests, you may return chosen character of yours with cost 1 to your hand. If you do, you may play a character with cost 1 for free.

cards.name: Woody & Buzz Lightyear - Best Buddies
cards.cardText:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Woody or Buzz Lightyear.)
TO INFINITY . . . When you play this character, if chosen opponent has more cards in their hand than you, draw cards until you have the same number.
. . . AND BEYOND! Whenever this character quests, you may play a card with cost 2 or less for free.

cards.name: Sulley & Boo - Scare Buddies
cards.cardText:
Combo Shift 4 {} (You may pay 4 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Sulley, one named Boo, or one of each.)

THE POWER OF FRIENDSHIP When this character is banished, if any of the cards that were under them are character cards, you may play those characters from your discard for free.

cards.name: The Madrigal Family - Every Generation
cards.cardText:
Madrigal Shift 3 {} (You may pay 3 {} to play this on top of one of your Madrigal characters.)

FAMILY BLESSINGS Once during your turn, whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Lilo & Stitch - Fun-Loving Friends
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lilo or Stitch.)

Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {} to another chosen character’s {} this turn.)

cards.name: If I Didn't Have You
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {} to sing this song for free.)
You and another chosen player each draw 2 cards.

cards.name: I’m Never Not By Your Side
cards.cardText:
Sing Together 5 (Any number of your or your teammates’ characters with total cost 5 or more may {} to sing this song for free.)

Remove up to 4 damage total from any number of your characters. You gain 1 lore for each 1 damage removed this way.

cards.name: Besties, Assemble!
cards.cardText:
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

"We all da bomb!"
–Miriam

cards.name: Nobody Like U
cards.cardText:
Sing Together 5 (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 5 or more may exert to sing this song for free.)
Play a character with cost 4 of less for free.

You're never not on my mind

cards.name: Powhatan's Staff
cards.cardText: STEP FORWARD {}, 1{} - The next character you play this turn enters play exerted and gains Bodyguard until the start of your next turn. (An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

cards.name: Rapunzel's Tower - Taken by the Vine
cards.cardText: EMBRACING CHANGE Your Floodborn characters get +2 {W}.

cards.name: Flewddur Fflam - Luckless Bard
cards.cardText:
CHASING ADVENTURE When you play this character, if a character of yours quested this turn, draw a card.

"Well, now, I can't say this was unexpected. But still, if you could just set me down gently . . ."

cards.name: Maleficent - Exultant Spellcaster
cards.cardText: "Such destruction! Look around–vines as far as the eye can see. And here we sit, at the heart of it."

cards.name: Winnie The Pooh - Hunny Archmage
cards.cardText:
STICK TOGETHER While you have 2 or more other Hunny characters in play, this character gets +2 {}.

Hunnymancy is a powerful magic, suitable only for the pure of heart.

cards.name: Panic - Hammer Enthusiast
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they’re played.)

Pain: "Are you sure this is gonna work?"
Panic: "We're about to find out!"

cards.name: Lumpy - Hunny Druid
cards.cardText:
WELCOME HEALING When you play this character, you may move up to 2 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

"Time for the heffalump healing touch!"

cards.name: Abu - Wise Sultan
cards.cardText:
RULER FOR A DAY When this character quests, banish him.

"Well, that's just great. I guess anyone can be sultan now."
– Iago

cards.name: Meilin Lee - Superficially Obedient
cards.cardText: NEWFOUND CONFIDENCE When you shift a character on top of her, this character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Genie - Hard to Grasp
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"Nice try, stinkweed, but there's only one thing that can contain me."

cards.name: Vixey - Expert Fisher
cards.cardText:
STEALING IN When you play this character, if you have a character with Evasive in play, you may return chosen character, item, or location with cost 2 or less to their player’s hand.

"I've got my dinner. Where's yours, Tod?"

cards.name: Meeko - Lucky Raccoon
cards.cardText: He didn't know how he was going to carry all of this fruit, but he sure was going to try.

cards.name: Pain - Running with Scissors
cards.cardText:
MULTIPURPOSE TOOL When you play this character, if you have a character card named Panic in your discard, gain 2 lore.

"Hey, you were right—this is fun!"
—Pain

cards.name: Ming Lee - Overprotective Parent
cards.cardText:
YOU’RE GROUNDED When you shift a character on top of this character, chosen opposing exerted character can’t ready at the start of their next turn.

"How could she do this to her own mother?"

cards.name: Merida - Wisp Conjurer
cards.cardText:
FOCUSED ENERGY This character may enter play exerted to draw a card.

BECKON During your turn, whenever another character of yours enters play exerted, you may draw a card.

cards.name: Mrs. Incredible - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
TORRENT Whenever one of your Floodborn characters quests, you pay 1{} less for the next character you shift this turn.

The vine's copy took her most valuable possession:
her identity.

cards.name: Pete - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
THORNY OVERGROWTH Your Floodborn characters gain Challenger +1. (They get +1 {} while challenging.)

Compared to actual Pete glimmers, this vine's copy was almost more pleasant to deal with.

cards.name: Grandma Wu - Wise Grandmother
cards.cardText:
Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {}.)
ANCESTRAL UNDERSTANDING When you shift a character on top of this character, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Heihei - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
BOTANICAL REMEDY Whenever one of your Floodborn characters quests, you may move 1 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

A copy with even less sense than the original.

cards.name: Hera - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
MYSTICAL BOON Whenever you play this or another Floodborn character, gain 1 lore.

You could do a lot worse than make a copy of a goddess.

cards.name: Tinker Bell - Finding a Way
cards.cardText:
"Tink, what do you see over there? Do you think
we can get in?"
–Peter Pan

cards.name: Morph - Little Imitator
cards.cardText:
ADVANCED MIMICRY You can shift any character on top of this character. (This includes all Shift variants.)

"Listen up. I've got a special job for you."
–John Silver

cards.name: Peter Pan - Playful Prankster
cards.cardText:
STAY RIGHT THERE When you play this character, chosen opposing character can’t ready at the start of their next turn.

"I've never met a problem I couldn't solve."

cards.name: Aladdin & Genie - Mischievous Pals
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 to play this on top of one of your characters named Aladdin or Genie.)
SLEIGHT OF HAND When you play this character, you may put any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you do, draw that number of cards plus 1.

cards.name: Peter Pan & Tinker Bell - Fast Friends
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {} (You may pay 4 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Peter Pan or Tinker Bell.)
YOU CAN FLY! Your characters gain Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Christopher Robin - Hunny Sage
cards.cardText:
GATHER THE PARTY You can have other Hunny characters in your deck regardless of ink type.

MAGICAL SUMMONS When you play this character, you may search your deck for a Hunny card, reveal it, and put it in your hand. If you do, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Winnie The Pooh & Piglet - Hunny Mages
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {} (You may pay 3 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Winnie the Pooh or Piglet.)

MAGICAL MIX This character gets +1 {} for each different ink type of characters you have in play.

cards.name: Maleficent & Diablo - Evil Incarnate
cards.cardText:
Shift 5 {} (You may pay 5 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Maleficent or Diablo.)

FOOLS! You may put 5 character cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck in any order to shift this character for free.

RAVEN'S CALL During your turn, whenever this character exerts, draw a card.

cards.name: You've Got Some Punch
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 2 or more can exert to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains rush and Challenger +2 this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played. They get +2 strength while challenging.)

cards.name: With A Few Good Friends
cards.cardText:
Sing Together 6 (Any number of your or your teammates’ characters with total cost 6 or more may {} to sing this song for free.)

Chosen player draws a card for each different ink type of characters you have in play.

cards.name: Petrify
cards.cardText:
Exert chosen opposing character.

"What's making that awful noise? It sounds like it's coming our way."
– Shonzozy, an Illumineer

cards.name: One And Only
cards.cardText:
Choose a character. Banish all other characters with the same name as that character.

"Is that . . . me? The vine made a copy of me to defend itself?!"

cards.name: Protective Aura
cards.cardText:
Your Floodborn characters gain Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

The glow of the vine-created replicas was beautiful . . .
but unsettling.

cards.name: Narrow Escape
cards.cardText: Return up to 2 chosen characters, items, or locations with cost 2 or less each to their player’s hand.

cards.name: Broken Pod
cards.cardText:
RENEWAL PROCESS {} , 1 {} - Put a card from chosen player's discard on the bottom of their deck.

"Looks like another vineling's on the loose. Let's go get it."
-Venturo, an Illumineer

cards.name: Magical Hunny Staff
cards.cardText:
GIFT OF THE HIVE Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {} to give chosen character of yours the Hunny classification until the start of your next turn.

SPELL OF SWIFTNESS {E}, 2 {I} – Chosen Hunny character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Source Of The Vine
cards.cardText:
SIPHON Whenever an opposing character quests, you gain 1 lore unless their player pays 1 {}.
RADIANT BLOOM {}, 2 {} — Gain 1 lore.

"Soon it'll drain every drop of ink in Lorcana . . ."
—Hana, an Illumineer

cards.name: Ring of Stones - Taken by the Vine
cards.cardText:
DEEP WISDOM Your Floodborn characters get +1 {L}.

The tendrils wrapped around each stone, searching for more ink.

cards.name: Carl Fredricksen - Loving Husband
cards.cardText:
TAKE MY HAND When you play this character, you pay 2 {} less for the next character named Ellie Fredricksen you play this turn.

"You know, Ellie, I think we're going to be together forever."

cards.name: Ellie Fredricksen - Loving Wife
cards.cardText:
ADVENTUROUS HEART Whenever you play a location, gain 1 lore.

"Every moment we're together is an adventure."

cards.name: Buzz Lightyear - Grounded
cards.cardText:
NOT A FLYING TOY This character can’t gain Evasive.

"Star Command, the foliage on this planet is uniquely disarming."

cards.name: Buzz Lightyear - Providing Cover
cards.cardText:
ACTION FIGURE When you play this character, choose one of the following. If you have another Toy character in play, choose both instead:
• You may return an action card with cost 2 or less from your discard to your hand.
• You may play an action with cost 2 or less for free.

cards.name: Gopher - Hunny Cook
cards.cardText:
DOWN THE HOLE This character may enter play exerted.

FORTIFYING MEAL During an opponent’s turn, while this character is exerted, your other Hunny characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

cards.name: Russell - Senior Wilderness Explorer
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {} (You may pay 3 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Russell.)
BASE CAMP Your characters at locations get +1{}.
GOOD LEADERSHIP Whenever one of your characters with 4{} or more quests, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Rapunzel - Tower Defender
cards.cardText:
THE FATE'S DESIGN When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card. If you do, return chosen character to their player's hand.

"I... said... GET... OUT!"

cards.name: Tod - Clever Fox
cards.cardText:
PROBLEM SOLVING When you play this character, draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.

"This would be a lot easier if these vines tasted better."

cards.name: Russell - Junior Wilderness Explorer
cards.cardText:
ASSISTING THE ELDERLY BADGE Whenever this character quests, you may move him and one of your other characters to the same location for free.

"An Explorer is a friend to all, be it plants or fish or tiny mole."

cards.name: Roo - Hunny Rogue
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

ELUSIVE EXPERTISE While you have another Hunny character in play, this character gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Winifred - Exasperated Elephant
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

"Hathi! Stop yapping about your medal and do something about this renegade vegetation!"

cards.name: Aladdin - Doing His Part
cards.cardText:
CLEAR IT OUT When you play this character, you may pay 1 {} to banish chosen item.

"I don't know what that is, but let's send it back where it came from."

cards.name: Madam Mim - Hummingbird
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
JUST HOW I LIKE IT All cards in your hand count as having {}.

cards.name: Minnie Mouse - Curious Adventurer
cards.cardText:
Minnie peered through the snarl of thorns.
Was that a narrow passage into the vine? She
wondered how far it might go.

cards.name: Kevin - Flightless Bird
cards.cardText:
BACK TO THE NEST Whenever this character quests, put this card on the top of your deck.

"She has been gathering food for her babies and
must get back to them."
—Dug

cards.name: Peter Pan - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
CLEVER TRICK Whenever one of your Floodborn characters is challenged, the challenging player chooses and discards a card.

The replicas the vine created glowed with an infusion of mixed ink.

cards.name: Copper - Creative Storyteller
cards.cardText:
"And then Chief was sleeping, but the vine touched his leg, and he jumped up in the air like this!"
–Copper

cards.name: Posey - Vampire Potato
cards.cardText:
Potato Shift 5 {} (You may pay 5 {} to play this on top of one of your items named Potato.)

"She's alive! Alive, I tell you!"
-Dr. Bushroot

cards.name: Dr. Bushroot - Evil Botanist
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can’t choose this character except to challenge.)
FAIR IS FAIR Whenever this character is challenged, chosen opponent chooses and discards a card.

cards.name: Mother Gothel - Evil as Ever
cards.cardText:
MUMMY'S BACK During your turn, when you discard this card, you may play this character from your discard. (You pay all costs.)

"Well, I'm glad somebody let me up."

cards.name: Tod & Copper - Best of Friends
cards.cardText:
Shift 2 {} (You may pay 2 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Tod or Copper.)

Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

cards.name: Rapunzel - Escaping the Tower
cards.cardText: THE CALL OF ADVENTURE Once during your turn, you may discard a card to give this character +1 {} and Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Cetus - Mighty Serpent
cards.cardText:
"Okay, so this vine? Not in my plans. But I'm a resourceful god. Gotta roll with punches. Adapt. Bring out the sea serpent."
–Hades

cards.name: Mushu - Stealthy Dragon
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
TIP THE SCALES Whenever this character quests, if an opponent has more cards in their hand than you, you may draw a card.

cards.name: Carl Fredricksen & Russell - Intrepid Explorers
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {} (You may pay 4 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Carl Fredricksen or Russell.)

OUTDOOR SKILLS While this character is at a location, all characters at that location get +1 {} and gain Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Mickey Mouse & Minnie Mouse - Adventuring Duo
cards.cardText:
Duo Shift 0 {} (You may pay 0 {} to play this on top of two of your characters, one named Mickey Mouse and one named Minnie Mouse.)

THINKING OF YOU If this character would be banished, put them into your inkwell facedown and exerted instead.

cards.name: Rapunzel & Flynn Rider - Unlikely Pair
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {} (You may pay 3 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Rapunzel or Flynn Rider.)
CLEVER SWAP Whenever this character quests, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
FRESH START During your turn, whenever you discard a character card, you may play that character from your discard. (You pay all costs.)

cards.name: To Wither A Flower
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 2 damage to each opposing damaged character.

cards.name: Piercing Attack
cards.cardText: Deal 2 damage to chosen character. This damage can't be reduced by Resist.

cards.name: Put That Thing Back
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {} to sing this song for free.)

Return chosen character or item to their player's hand.

…Where it came from or so help me

cards.name: Scout Ahead
cards.cardText:
If an opponent has more lore than you, gain 2 lore.

When the odds seem longest, Mickey and Minnie will
find their way through.

cards.name: Potato
cards.cardText:
FULL OF POTENTIAL This item enters play exerted.

It doesn't have much flavor.

cards.name: My Adventure Book
cards.cardText:
NEW MEMORIES {}, 1{} - Reveal the top card of your deck. If it’s a non-character card or a character card named Kevin, put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

"Thanks for the adventure—now go have a new one! Love, Ellie"

cards.name: Vine Pod
cards.cardText:
FRAGILE HUSK This item enters play exerted.
REGENERATE {}, 1{} - Banish chosen character of yours. You may play a character with the same name as that character for free.

cards.name: Paradise Falls - Exotic Destination
cards.cardText:
QUITE A SIGHT While you have a character here, this location gets +3 {L}.

A land lost in time.

cards.name: Dash Parr - Super Fast
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {} (You may pay 3 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Dash Parr.)

Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

FOLLOW ME! Whenever this character quests, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If you do, you may play it. Otherwise, put it into your discard. (You pay all costs.)

cards.name: Yzma - Choosy Customer
cards.cardText:
GET THIS RIGHT When you play this character, each opponent loses 1 lore.

"Is there anything on this menu that isn't swimming in gravy?"

cards.name: Kuzco - Picky Customer
cards.cardText:
"Give me the chili cheese sampler, hold the chili and
put the cheese on the side. Oh, and extra gravy . . .
Hey! Are you listening? I'm ordering here!"

cards.name: The Bear - Territorial Animal
cards.cardText:
SAVAGE FURY While this character has damage, he gets +3 {}.

"Look, Copper. The vine's no match for that bear!"
–Amos Slade

cards.name: Carl Fredricksen - On the Move
cards.cardText:
MOVING PARTNER Whenever you play a location, you may move this character and up to 1 of your other characters to that location for free.

ADVENTURE AWAITS Whenever this character quests while at a location, draw cards equal to that location’s {}.

cards.name: Dash Parr - Dodgeball Dynamo
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"Hey look, I'm here! No wait, I'm over here now! Nope, back here again!"

cards.name: Gaston - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
DRAWING STRENGTH Your Floodborn characters get +1 {}.

"Of course the vine would copy me. Look at him! He's almost as handsome as I am."
– Gaston

cards.name: Colonel Hathi - On the March
cards.cardText:
HUP, TWO, THREE, FOUR Whenever this character quests, you may move him to one of your locations for free.

"March, march, march. No complaining."

cards.name: Splodyhead - Experiment 619
cards.cardText:
"Is ideal experiment for making of campfires,
roasting of marshmallows, and also blowing up
of things."
– Jumba Jookiba

cards.name: Pacha - Panicked Customer
cards.cardText:
Reckless (This character can’t quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
ADRENALINE SURGE During your turn, this character gets +4 {}.

cards.name: Sun Yee - Red Panda Spirit
cards.cardText: Temporary Red Panda Shift 2 {} (You may pay 2 {} to play this on top of one of your Red Panda characters. At the end of your turn, remove all damage from this character and return only this card to your hand.)

cards.name: Grandma Wu - Fierce Red Panda
cards.cardText:
Temporary Shift 4 {} (You may pay 4 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Grandma Wu. At the end of your turn, remove all damage from this character and return only this card to your hand.)

INTIMIDATING CHARGE Whenever this character challenges another character, you gain 2 lore and each opponent loses 2 lore.

cards.name: King Louie - King of Swing
cards.cardText:
Singer 6 (This character counts as cost 6 to sing songs.)

"Come on, groove with ol' King Louie. You cats need to relax!"

cards.name: Beast - Fierce Defender
cards.cardText:
FORMIDABLE LOVE While you have a character named Belle in play, this character gets +2 {}.

The Beast treasured two things above all: the enchanted rose and the love who could break his curse.

cards.name: Randall Boggs - Envious Coworker
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

AFTER-HOURS PROJECT While all cards in your inkwell are exerted, this character gets +2 {}.

cards.name: Donald Duck - Vineling Rider
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they’re played.)

Mickey Mouse: "I wouldn't do that, Donald!"
Donald Duck: "That's why I have more fun!"

cards.name: Meilin Lee - Popular Red Panda
cards.cardText:
Temporary Shift 3 {} (You may pay 3 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Meilin Lee. At the end of your turn, remove all damage from this character and return only this card to your hand.)

KARAOKE QUEEN Once during your turn, whenever this character sings a song, gain 3 lore.

cards.name: Tigger - Hunny Barbarian
cards.cardText:
Reckless (This character can’t quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

PROTECTIVE CHARGE Once during your turn, whenever this character challenges another character, you may ready chosen Hunny character. If you do, that character can’t quest for the rest of this turn.

cards.name: Boo - Energetic Child
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they’re played.)

KID-TASTROPHE! Whenever this character challenges another character with 3 {} or less, banish that character. (No damage is dealt in that challenge.)

cards.name: Sulley - Protective Monster
cards.cardText:
FEARSOME GLARE When you play this character, you may exert all cards in your inkwell.

RILED UP While all cards in your inkwell are exerted, this character gains Rush. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

cards.name: Ming Lee - Giant Red Panda
cards.cardText:
Temporary Shift 7 {} (You may pay 7 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Ming Lee. At the end of your turn, remove all damage from this character and return only this card to your hand.)

PATH OF DESTRUCTION Whenever this character challenges another character, ready her. She can’t quest for the rest of this turn.

cards.name: Captain Hook - Conniving Pirate
cards.cardText:
HAVE AT YOU Whenever this character challenges another character, gain 1 lore.

"Smee! We have some uninvited guests—time to show them our famed hospitality."

cards.name: Peter Pan - Vine Duelist
cards.cardText: "Come on, you big bully. You've gotta be faster than that!"

cards.name: Belle & Beast - Certain as the Sun
cards.cardText:
Shift 6 {} (You may pay 6 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Belle or Beast.)
INSPIRING DANCE Whenever this character quests, ready all cards in your inkwell.
APPRECIATIVE AUDIENCE 6 {} – Ready your other characters. They can’t quest for the rest of this turn.

cards.name: Dash Parr & Violet Parr - Super Siblings
cards.cardText:
Combo Shift 6 {} (You may pay 6 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Dash Parr, one named Violet Parr, or one of each.)

Evasive, Resist +1

INCREDIBLE TACTICS Whenever this character quests or challenges, draw a card for each card under them.

cards.name: Red Moon Ritual
cards.cardText:
Sing Together 7 (Any number of your or your teammates’ characters with total cost 7 or more may {} to sing this song for free.)

Banish chosen character.

cards.name: Red Alert
cards.cardText:
Banish chosen character with 3 {} or less. If you have a Monster character in play, chosen opponent loses 1 lore.

"Please remain calm. This is not a drill."
– CDA Agent

cards.name: Rahr!
cards.cardText:
Chosen character gets +3 {} this turn.

"Did you see the look on my face? It was the scariest one yet!"
–Mike Wazowski

cards.name: Prophetic Vision
cards.cardText:
Shuffle your deck, then reveal the top card. If it’s an action card, you may play it for free. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck, then each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

The vision showed the city but not the source of its power.

cards.name: It's Gonna Be Great!
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {} to sing this song for free.)

Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

cards.name: Scream Canister
cards.cardText:
ERRATIC SCREAMS {}, 2 {} - Exert all cards in your inkwell. Exert chosen opposing character with 2 {} or less.

"Those screams are unstable, Randall." Pffft. Maybe for you, you big hairball."

cards.name: Bunch Of Balloons
cards.cardText:
FLOAT AWAY When you play this item, choose a location of yours. While this item is in play, that location gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge it.)

OUT OF SIGHT 3{} - Return this item to your hand.

cards.name: Beast - Overrun by
cards.cardText:
IMMINENT THREAT Your Floodborn characters get {} while they're played.

A deep rumble echoed through the ...

cards.name: Carl's House - Flying High
cards.cardText: MOVING DAY Once during your turn, you may move 1 damage counter from here to another location for free. If you do, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Launchpad - Sky Patrol
cards.cardText:
Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

Launchpad: "Don't worry, DW, I'll make sure we crash there safely!"

Darkwing Duck: "That's what I'm afraid of."

cards.name: Dug - Good Boy
cards.cardText:
FETCH! When you play this character, if you have an item in play, draw a card.

"A ball! Oh boy, oh boy, a ball!"

cards.name: Roz - Always Watching
cards.cardText:
ALWAYS Each opponent plays with the top card of their deck faceup.

"And I'm sure you filed your paperwork correctly.
For once."

cards.name: Merlin - Envisioning the Future
cards.cardText:
MINOR TRICKERY When you play this character, you may draw a card from the bottom of your deck.

AGE OF INCONVENIENCE When this character is banished, put this card from your discard on the bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Quackerjack - Loony Toymaker
cards.cardText: EVIL DESIGN When you play this character and whenever he quests, put the top 4 cards of your deck into your discard. You may deal 1 damage to chosen character for each item card put into your discard this way.

cards.name: Belle - Always Reading
cards.cardText:
DREAMING OF MORE You pay 1 {} less to shift a character on top of this character.

"I just finished the most wonderful story about a beanstalk and an ogre ..."

cards.name: Ellie Fredricksen - Adventure Partner
cards.cardText:
ALWAYS WITH YOU When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

"Adventure has a way of finding us wherever we go."

cards.name: Mrs. Hasagawa - Fruit Vendor
cards.cardText: The old woman turned as the vine's shadow fell over her fruit stand. "Hello, dear! More mangoes today?"

cards.name: Alpha - Pack Leader
cards.cardText:
WHO WANTS A TREAT? Whenever you play an item, chosen character gets +1 {} and gains Resist +1 this turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

"Now we will find the small mailman and The One Who Smells of Prunes."

cards.name: Sulley - Strategic Scarer
cards.cardText:
JUMP SCARE While you have 5 or more cards in your inkwell, this character gets +2 {}.

"Show them what it takes to be our top scarer!"
–Henry J. Waternoose III

cards.name: Randall Boggs - Scary Smart
cards.cardText:
GET OUTTA HERE! When you play this character, put chosen character of yours into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

DEVIOUS PLAN At the end of your turn, if all cards in your inkwell are exerted, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Piglet - Hunny Mage Apprentice
cards.cardText:
"It's okay, Piglet. Being scared doesn't mean you're not brave. In fact, I think you can only be brave if you're scared first!"
 Christopher Robin, Hunny Sage

cards.name: Mickey Mouse - Inquisitive Explorer
cards.cardText:
"Oh boy, I knew climbing this vine would be worth it.
There's so much to see up here!"

cards.name: Hades - Meticulous Schemer
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can’t choose this character except to challenge.)

"This little guy is so hideous! I love it! And the way it sucks up flood ink? Even I couldn't have planned it any better."

cards.name: Antonio Madrigal - Animal Doctor
cards.cardText: HEALING HANDS When you play this character, you may remove up to 3 damage from chosen character of yours. If you removed damage this way, put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Maid Marian - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText: INKFLOW Whenever one of your Floodborn characters is banished, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Robin Hood - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
KEEN-EYED Your Floodborn characters gain Alert.
(They can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

The vine created defenders to keep silent watch on the surrounding lands.

cards.name: Boo - Human Child
cards.cardText:
MAKING MEMORIES While you have 5 or more cards in your inkwell, this character gets +2 {}.

For the rest of her life, Boo would remember her friend, Kitty.

cards.name: Pluto - Suspicious Sentry
cards.cardText:
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {} to another chosen character’s {} this turn.)

He didn't like the smell of that vine one bit.

cards.name: Charles Muntz - Obsessive Explorer
cards.cardText:
USEFUL GEAR Whenever you play an item, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

FIND THAT BIRD! Whenever this character quests, look at the top card of your deck. If it's a character card named Kevin, you may reveal it and put it into your hand to gain 3 lore. Otherwise, put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Henry J. Waternoose Iii - Chief Executive Officer
cards.cardText: THE BOTTOM LINE While you have more cards in your inkwell than each opposing player, this character gets +2 {} and gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

cards.name: Eeyore - Hunny Scholar
cards.cardText:
HUNNYTACTICS Whenever this character quests, chosen Hunny character of yours gets +1 {} and gains Ward until the start of your next turn.
(Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

"It's okay. Pile more things on. I'll be fine."

cards.name: Darkwing Duck & Launchpad - St. Canard’s Finest
cards.cardText:
Shift 5 {} (You may pay 5 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Darkwing Duck or Launchpad.)

Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

VICTORY POSE During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, gain 2 lore.

cards.name: Power Surge
cards.cardText:
Each player puts the top 2 cards of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

Sulley: "What was that?"

Mike: "I have no idea, but it would be really great if it didn't do it again."

cards.name: Focused Search
cards.cardText: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character card named Kevin or an item card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: We've Got A Lot To Do!
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {} to sing this song for free.)

Put chosen item or location into its player’s inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Startle
cards.cardText:
Chosen character gets -3 {} this turn.

"Hey, careful, buddy! That's not me. That's a vine copy of me!"
—Aladdin

cards.name: Closet Door Portal
cards.cardText:
KNOCK, KNOCK This item enters play exerted.
WHO'S THERE? {}, 2 {} - Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character, item, or location card with cost 6 or less and play it for free. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Hana's Inkcaster
cards.cardText: REJUVENATING FLOURISH {} – Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character. If there’s a card under that character, they gain Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

cards.name: Laugh Canister
cards.cardText: COPYCAT {} - Put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted. Chosen opponent may put the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Translation Collar
cards.cardText:
YOU ARE MY FRIEND {}, 1{} - Chosen character gets +1 {} and gains Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {} to another chosen character's {} this turn.)

"SQUIRREL!"

cards.name: Big Book Of Hunny
cards.cardText: INVOKE HUNNY {}, 2 {} - Reveal the top card of your deck. If it’s a Hunny card, put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Hundred Acre Wood - Hunny Campsite
cards.cardText:
HOME AWAY FROM HOME Characters get +1 {W} while here. 
HUNNY QUEST Hunny characters get +1{L} while here.

cards.name: Violet Parr - Super Resilient
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 ink to play this on top of one of your characters named Violet Parr.)
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
HEROIC SYNERGY Whenever you play this or another Hero character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

cards.name: Aladdin - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
THE VINE PROVIDES Whenever one of your Floodborn characters quests, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

"Wait, that's not an Aladdin glimmer—that's a vineling replica!"
—Shanzay, an Illumineer

cards.name: Willie The Giant - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
DEFEND THE STALK Your Floodborn characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

The vine's embrace helped shield its replicas from harm.

cards.name: Sprout - Experiment 509
cards.cardText:
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

BOTANICAL EVIL When you play this character, you may choose and discard an Alien character card or a location card from your hand. If you do, deal 2 damage to chosen character.

cards.name: Stitch - Protector of Frogs
cards.cardText: "My frog! It is very important!"

cards.name: Sheriff Of Nottingham - Vine Slayer
cards.cardText:
Challenger +3 (While challenging, this character gets +3 {}.)

"Now, look here, you overgrown weed . . ."

cards.name: Mata - Meat Hut Waitress
cards.cardText: "Three pork combos, extra bacon on the side, two chili cheese samplers, a basket of liver and onion rings, a catch of the day, and a steak cut in the shape of a trout."

cards.name: Violet Parr - Force Field Practice
cards.cardText:
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

"Mom? I'm sorry to call you, but um, I think there's a pretty big problem outside the house."

cards.name: Dr. Hamsterviel - Evil Observer
cards.cardText:
Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

"No one can hide from me. From here I can see everything!"

cards.name: Owl - Hunny Ranger
cards.cardText: HUNNY ALLIANCE While you have another Hunny character in play, this character gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

cards.name: Megavolt - Electrical Menace
cards.cardText:
FORCE FIELD While you have no cards in your hand, this character gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

"This guy's a real live wire!"
—Launchpad

cards.name: Darkwing Duck - Shadowy Superhero
cards.cardText:
PREEMPTIVE STRIKE When you play this character, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.

"No one messes with Darkwing Duck and gets away with it!"

cards.name: Omnidroid - Scanning for Threats
cards.cardText:
FACTORY SETTINGS While this character has no damage, it gets +2 strength.

"All right, let's see who's gonna be facing this bad boy!" - Syndrome

cards.name: Flynn Rider - High-Climbing Rogue
cards.cardText: WE CAN WORK THIS OUT Whenever an opponent chooses this character for an action or ability, they choose and discard a card.

cards.name: The Irate Chef - Meat Hut Cook
cards.cardText:
"All right, buster, that's it! You want a special order, then you make it!"
—The Irate Chef

cards.name: Kronk - Meat Hut Cook
cards.cardText:
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
PICKUP! Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {} to draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

"You want that extra crispy?"

cards.name: Mulan - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
DEMOLISH Whenever you play this or another Floodborn character, you may banish chosen item.

This replica is just as good in a fight as the original—no training necessary.

cards.name: Diablo - Protecting His Mistress
cards.cardText:
FLURRY OF FEATHERS Your characters named Maleficent gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

"You are the only one I can trust, my pet."
–Maleficent

cards.name: Scar - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
VICTOR’S REWARD During your turn, whenever one of your Floodborn characters banishes another character in a challenge, gain 1 lore.

FILL THE RANKS During an opponent’s turn, whenever one of your Floodborn characters is banished, draw a card.

cards.name: Maximus - Relentless Stallion
cards.cardText: NO ESCAPE If you discarded a card this turn, this character gains Challenger +2 and can challenge ready characters this turn. (They get +2 strength while challenging.)

cards.name: Omnidroid - Ultimate Iteration
cards.cardText:
Shift 6 (You may pay 6 ink to play this on top of one of your characters named Omnidroid.)
Resist +2 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)
RETURN ON INVESTMENT When you shift this character, you may return all cards under it to your hand.

cards.name: The Vine - Towering Stalk
cards.cardText:
Floodborn Shift 7 {} (You may pay 7 {} to play this on top of one of your Floodborn characters.)
SATURATE Your other exerted Floodborn characters gain Bodyguard.
HOSTILE SWARM During an opponent’s turn, whenever one of your Floodborn characters is banished, deal 1 damage to each opposing character.

cards.name: Cower Before Me!
cards.cardText: Up to 2 chosen opposing characters can't challenge during their next turn.

cards.name: We'll Save Our Village
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)

Your characters and locations gain Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

cards.name: Look What You've Done
cards.cardText: Deal 2 damage to chosen character. During your turn, when you discard this card, you may play it from your discard. (You pay all costs.)

cards.name: You Broke My Smolder
cards.cardText:
Discard your hand. Draw 2 cards.

"You know, this happens a lot more often than you'd think."

cards.name: Attack Of The Vine!
cards.cardText: Your Floodborn characters gain Resist +2 and can challenge ready characters this turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

cards.name: Windstorm
cards.cardText: Deal 1 damage to each opposing character and location. Then, deal 2 damage to each opposing character with Evasive and each opposing location with Evasive.

cards.name: Discarded Armor
cards.cardText: FOUND EQUIPMENT exert - If you discarded a card this turn, chosen character of yours gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

cards.name: The Weedwhacker
cards.cardText:
FULL POWER {}, 1 {} – Chosen character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {} while challenging.)

CLEAR-CUT 2 {}, Banish this item – Banish chosen Vinetling character.

cards.name: Absorbing Bloom
cards.cardText:
METAMORPHOSIS {}, 1{} - If a character was banished in a challenge this turn, draw a card.

"Oh, this is fascinating! How does it do that?"
– Hana, an Illumineer

cards.name: Vine Entrance - Ominous Passageway
cards.cardText: BOOT OF POWER The first time a Floodbon character moves here each turn, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.

cards.name: Jasmine - Vine Expert
cards.cardText:
SHARED RESOURCES When you play this character, each player draws a card.

"This looks like a problem, and I've got a solution!"

cards.name: Meilin Lee - Losing Control
cards.cardText: RED PANDA POWER When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Red Panda character card or a song card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: Heihei - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
BOTANICAL REMEDY Whenever one of your Floodborn characters quests, you may move 1 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

A copy with even less sense than the original.

cards.name: Winnie The Pooh - Hunny Archmage
cards.cardText:
STICK TOGETHER While you have 2 or more other Hunny characters in play, this character gets +2 {}.

Hunnymancy is a powerful magic, suitable only for the pure of heart.

cards.name: Mrs. Incredible - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
TORRENT Whenever one of your Floodborn characters quests, you pay 1 {} less for the next character you shift this turn.

The vine's copy took her most valuable possession: her identity.

cards.name: Mother Gothel - Evil as Ever
cards.cardText:
MUMMY'S BACK During your turn, when you discard this card, you may play this character from your discard. (You pay all costs.)

"Well, I'm glad somebody let me up!"

cards.name: Kevin - Flightless Bird
cards.cardText:
BACK TO THE NEST Whenever this character quests, put this card on the top of your deck.

"She has been gathering food for her babies and must get back to them."
–Dug

cards.name: Peter Pan - Created by the Vine
cards.cardText:
CLEVER TRICK Whenever one of your Floodborn characters is challenged, the challenging player chooses and discards a card.

The replicas the vine created glowed with an infusion of mixed ink.

cards.name: Randall Boggs - Envious Coworker
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

AFTER-HOURS PROJECT While all cards in your inkwell are exerted, this character gets +2 {}.

cards.cardText: Temporary Red Panda Shift 2 {} (You may pay 2 {} to play this on top of one of your Red Panda characters. At the end of your turn, remove all damage from this character and return only this card to your hand.)

cards.name: Dash Parr - Dodgeball Dynamo
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"Hey look, I'm here! No wait, I'm over here now! Nope, back here again!"

cards.name: Henry J. Waternoose Iii - Chief Executive Officer

ALWAYS Each opponent plays with the top card of their deck faceup.

For once."

cards.cardText:
FORCE FIELD While you have no cards in your hand, this character gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

—Launchpad

cards.name: Mike Wazowski - Heroic Climber
cards.cardText: FIND A FRIEND When you play this character and whenever he quests, each player reveals the top card of their deck. If it’s a character card, they may put it into their hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of their deck.

cards.name: Pocahontas & Meeko - Adventurous Friends
Woody & Buzz Lightyear - Best Buddies
